Declaration Of Travis J. Burch Iso Default
Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Recorded by For the Record (9:35am-10:18am) (514)

Judge Tong makes election disclosure.
Travis J. Burch, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Kyle Slaugh, also present. Both appeared via Zoom.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Lugg Inc., a Delaware Corporation.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Witness: Kyle Slaugh sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $153,073.17
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,939.00
Attorney's Fees: $12,870.00
Costs: $475.63
Total Judgment in the amount of $170,357.80
Judgment signed in open court.

Declaration Of Travis J. Burch Iso Default
